title: Mule Armor
description: Allows mules to wear horse armor in addition to chests. Compatible with mortuusars' Horseman mod!
body:
This mod allows mules to wear armor! I mean, they're a combo of horses and donkeys, so they should be able to have the best of both worlds, right? This also gives them the appropriate slot on the UI, of course.
Compatible with Horseman by mortuusars!
